es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En un fallo reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha decidido que las obras creadas por inteligencia artificial no son elegibles para la protección de derechos de autor. Esta decisión ha generado un gran debate en la industria musical, ya que muchos artistas y productores han comenzado a utilizar la IA para crear música.

sections.title: La empresa de música Amper Music lanza una plataforma de licencias para obras de AI
sections.content: La empresa de música Amper Music ha lanzado una plataforma de licencias para obras de inteligencia artificial, lo que permite a los productores y compositores obtener los derechos necesarios para utilizar música creada por IA en sus proyectos. Esta plataforma es una de las primeras en ofrecer una solución clara y transparente para la licencia de obras de AI.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo registrar tus obras de AI
sections.content: Para registrar tus obras de IA, es importante que sigas los siguientes pasos: primero, asegúrate de que la obra sea original y no infrinja los derechos de autor de otros. Luego, debes determinar si la obra es elegible para la protección de derechos de autor. Finalmente, debes registrar la obra en la oficina de derechos de autor correspondiente, como la Oficina de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent ruling, the US Supreme Court has decided that works created by artificial intelligence are not eligible for copyright protection. This decision has sparked a significant debate in the music industry, as many artists and producers have begun using AI to create music. Companies like Spotify and Apple Music are closely watching the developments, as they have already started to incorporate AI-generated music into their platforms.

sections.title: Amper Music Launches AI Music Licensing Platform
sections.content: Music company Amper Music has launched a licensing platform for AI-generated music, allowing producers and composers to obtain the necessary rights to use AI-created music in their projects. This platform is one of the first to offer a clear and transparent solution for licensing AI-generated music, and it has already gained attention from major music industry players like Universal Music Group and Sony Music.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Registering Your AI-Generated Works
sections.content: To register your AI-generated works, follow these steps: first, ensure the work is original and does not infringe on others' copyrights. Next, determine if the work is eligible for copyright protection. Finally, register the work with the relevant copyright office, such as the US Copyright Office. It is also essential to keep records of the creation process, including any human involvement, to demonstrate the work's eligibility for protection.
